original-actions: Flees through Argos after killing a magistrate who demanded he betray a friend
Leaps aboard the departing merchant galley Argus to escape pursuing guards
Threatens the shipmaster Tito with his sword to demand passage
Sheathes his weapon and accepts the captain's invitation for ale
Requests a bow when the pirate ship Tigress approaches
Shoots arrows at Belit's spearmen from the poop deck during the attack
Rallies the Argus crew after Captain Tito is killed in battle
Leaps aboard the Tigress alone when the fight becomes hopeless
Kills numerous black warriors in furious close combat while surrounded
Freezes when Belit commands her warriors to spare him
Accepts Belit's offer to become her mate and co-leader of her pirates
Raids the Black Coast alongside Belit for years, earning the name "Amra"
Participates in slaughtering Stygian ships and coastal settlements with Belit's crew
Sails up the forbidden river Zarkheba with Belit seeking a lost city's treasure
Discusses theology with Belit, comparing Crom to her Shemite deities
Spots the winged creature atop a column and watches it fly into the jungle
Helps lift the altar in the ruined tower, triggering a collapse that kills four men
Examines the revealed crypt filled with gems beneath the fallen altar
Volunteers to lead twenty warriors into the jungle to find fresh water
Halts his men and steps behind a tree to investigate stalking presences
Inhales the Black Lotus and falls unconscious in the jungle
Awakens from drug-induced visions and tracks his lost spearmen
Kills N'Gora with his sword after the maddened warrior attacks him
Discovers the cliff where the remaining spearmen fell to their deaths
Rushes back to the galley and finds Belit hanged from the yard-arm
Wraps Belit's body in his scarlet cloak and lays her on a pyre of broken benches
Positions himself atop the pyramid with bow and arrows to await the monsters
Shoots down the charging were-hyenas in a hail of arrows
Fights the remaining creatures in brutal hand-to-hand combat atop the pyramid
Becomes trapped under debris when the pyramid partially collapses
Heaves away the stone pinning him after Belit's spirit intervenes
Charges the winged monster and bisects it with a single sword stroke
Cuts the Tigress loose and lets the current carry her toward the sea
Watches from the beach as the burning ship disappears over the horizon

Threatens ship captain with drawn blade to demand passage
Sheathes weapon and accepts captain's offer of hospitality

Kills numerous enemies in furious close combat while surrounded
Freezes when pirate queen commands her warriors to spare him
Accepts offer to become mate and co-leader of pirate band
Raids coastline alongside lover for years, earning fearsome reputation
Participates in raiding ships and coastal settlements with crew
Sails up forbidden river with lover seeking lost city's treasure
Discusses theology with lover, comparing different gods and beliefs
Spots inhuman creature and watches it flee into the wilds
Helps disturb ancient ruin, triggering collapse that kills several men
Examines revealed treasure crypt beneath fallen altar
Volunteers to lead warriors into dangerous territory for supplies
Halts patrol and investigates signs of stalking presences
Inhales supernatural intoxicant and falls unconscious
Awakens from drug-induced visions and tracks lost companions
Kills maddened ally in self-defense when attacked
Discovers site where remaining companions met their deaths
Returns to ship and finds lover murdered by unknown enemy
Wraps lover's body in cloak and prepares funeral pyre
Takes elevated defensive position with ranged weapons to await monsters
Shoots down charging monsters in hail of arrows
Fights remaining creatures in brutal hand-to-hand combat
Becomes trapped under debris when structure collapses
Breaks free after spiritual intervention from deceased lover
Charges the monster and kills it with single devastating blow
Sets funeral ship adrift on the current toward open water
Watches from shore as burning ship disappears over horizon
